== Prince Nerd's Soul ♂ ==
The tragic prince who was killed by his brother. Its ghost wandered around in the world...

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Prince Nerd's Soul, complete [[Koryeo]] Key Clue "Cilla Treasure Map"

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 10 letters back and forth, Prince Nerd's Soul will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift {{Relink|Demon Container|green}}.

===★☆☆ > ★★★===
After 18 letters back and forth, Prince Nerd's Soul will move in permanently with his minion, Tomb Figure. A storyline with [[Mailbox#Billie|Billie]] will also be triggered.

==Rent==
[[File:Prince Nerd's Soul rent.png|frameless|left]]

Prince Nerd's Soul rent is collected on '''Wednesday''' and appears as a blue scroll on the right-side tabletop.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +1|blue}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +1|purple}}, {{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +1|orange}}

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Offering Speedup!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Offering Speedup +1h
|-
|★★
|Offering Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★
|Offering Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★★
|Offering Speedup +2h
|-
|★★★★★
|Offering Speedup +3h
|-
|★★★★★★
|Offering Speedup +4h
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Annals of Joseon}}{{Relink|Annals of Joseon}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Hun Min Jong Um}}{{Relink|Hun Min Jong Um}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Shakespeare Scripts}}{{Relink|Shakespeare Scripts}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Speech of MLK}}{{Relink|Speech of MLK}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Gutenberg's Press}}{{Relink|Gutenberg's Press}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Shahnameh}}{{Relink|Shahnameh}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Travels of Marco Polo}}{{Relink|Travels of Marco Polo}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Napoleonic Code}}{{Relink|Napoleonic Code}}
|}

==Prince's Curse==
The prince is full of resentment for his tragic past and sends a chill to all the living things coming too close...

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||FTH +5||Soul Offering SPD +0.6%
|-
|2||180||2k||FTH +10||Soul Offering SPD +1.2%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||FTH +15||Soul Offering SPD +1.8%
|-
|4||200||8k||FTH +20||Soul Offering SPD +2.4%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||FTH +25||Soul Offering SPD +3%
|-
|6||220||18k||FTH +30||Soul Offering SPD +3.6%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||FTH +35||Soul Offering SPD +4.2%
|-
|8||240||32k||FTH +40||Soul Offering SPD +4.8%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||FTH +45||Soul Offering SPD +5.4%
|-
|10||260||50k||FTH +50||Soul Offering SPD +6%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||FTH +55||Soul Offering SPD +6.6%
|-
|12||285||72k||FTH +60||Soul Offering SPD +7.2%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||FTH +65||Soul Offering SPD +7.8%
|-
|14||315||98k||FTH +70||Soul Offering SPD +8.4%
|-
|15||330||112k||FTH +75||Soul Offering SPD +9%
|-
|16||345||123k||FTH +80||Soul Offering SPD +9.6%
|-
|17||360||144k||FTH +85||Soul Offering SPD +9.8%
|-
|18||375||162k||FTH +90||Soul Offering SPD +10.4%
|-
|19||390||180k||FTH +95||Soul Offering SPD +11%
|-
|20||400||200k||FTH +100||Soul Offering SPD +11.6%
|-
|21||420||220k||FTH +105||Soul Offering SPD +12.2%
|-
|22||440||242k||FTH +110||Soul Offering SPD +12.8%
|-
|23||460||264k||FTH +115||Soul Offering SPD +13.8%
|-
|24||480||285k||FTH +120||Soul Offering SPD +14.4%
|-
|25||500||309k||FTH +125||Soul Offering SPD +15%
|-
|26||520||333k||FTH +130||Soul Offering SPD +15.6%
|-
|27||540||357k||FTH +135||Soul Offering SPD +16.2%
|-
|28||560||381k||FTH +140||Soul Offering SPD +16.8%
|-
|29||580||405k||FTH +145||Soul Offering SPD +17.4%
|-
|30||600||429k||FTH +150||Soul Offering SPD +18%
|}

== Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Prince's Curse is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +10 
|-
|2||4k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +20 
|-
|3||6k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +30 
|-
|4||8k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +40
|-
|5||10k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +50
|-
|6||12k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +60
|-
|7||14k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +70
|-
|8||16k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +80
|-
|9||18k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +90
|-
|10||20k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +100 
|-
|11||22k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +110 
|-
|12||24k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +120 
|-
|13||26k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +130 
|-
|14||28k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +140 
|-
|15||30k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +150 
|-
|16||32k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +160 
|-
|17||34k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +170 
|-
|18||36k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +180 
|-
|19||38k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +190 
|-
|20||40k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +200 
|-
|21||42k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +210 
|-
|22||44k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +220 
|-
|23||46k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +230 
|-
|24||48k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +240 
|-
|25||50k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +250 
|-
|26||55k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +260 
|-
|27||60k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +270 
|-
|28||65k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +280 
|-
|29||70k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +290 
|-
|30||75k||Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Tomb Figure in battle, Troop DEF +300 
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Prince Nerd's Soul specializes in '''Zombie Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Zombie is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Tomb Figure==
Figures buried with an ancient noble, capable of passing the simplest Turing test after absorbing the energy of the grave!

===Special Ability - Stone Skin===
Per 10 Tomb Figures in battle, Troop Earth RES +1 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Tomb Figures!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Bronze Bird}}<br>{{relink|Bronze Bird}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Minie Ball}}<br>{{relink|Minie Ball}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Gordian Knot}}<br>{{relink|Gordian Knot}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3% 
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Spirit of Laws}}<br>{{relink|Spirit of Laws}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Guevara's Portrait}}<br>{{relink|Guevara's Portrait}}
|HP +4% 
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|SDI}}<br>{{relink|SDI}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Proclamation 95}}<br>{{relink|Proclamation 95}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Medal of Honor}}<br>{{relink|Medal of Honor}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
